description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build - Staging that runs on a workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: stage-release and stage-docker-release. The stage-release job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment in a defi/ain-builder:latest container with a matrix strategy for multiple targets, checks out the code, configures the environment, sets up dependencies, uses a Rust cache, builds and packages the project, and uploads the artifact. The stage-docker-release job depends on stage-release, downloads the binaries, and builds a Docker image.
